title: Document R1 MVP support and Meshtastic app limitations
description: Why this exists: users and future agents need exact support boundaries. What needs to be done: document hardware revision assumptions, build/flash commands, BLE pairing flow, supported Meshtastic app screens/actions, unsupported app features, known issues, and troubleshooting logs. Acceptance criteria: docs match verified hardware behavior; unsupported features are explicit; follow-up Beads exist for every known gap.
